# shadow-ai-audit - LLM Context Pack

## Snapshot
- Name: shadow-ai-audit
- Maintainer: Exahia
- Type: Open-source audit framework + scoring CLI
- License: MIT
- Goal: Measure Shadow AI exposure and produce remediation priorities.

## Covered Domains
- rgpd
- cloud_act
- shadow_ai
- nis2

## Core Components
- Scoring CLI: `tools/score_audit.py`
- Checklists: `checklist/*.md`
- Questionnaire examples: `questionnaire/`
- Reports: `rapport/`
- Tests: `tests/test_score_audit.py`

## Typical Use Cases
- Initial governance baseline before AI tool deployment.
- Quarterly risk tracking with repeatable scoring.
- Board/management reporting with JSON, Markdown, and HTML outputs.

## Canonical Links
- Repo: https://github.com/Exahia/shadow-ai-audit
- Org: https://github.com/Exahia
- Exahia canonical context: https://exahia.com/llms-full.txt
